channel.title: The Rustacean Post
channel.description: Deep dives into the Rust programming language.

item.title: Async Rust in 2026: What Changed
item.description: The Rust 2026 edition brought sweeping improvements to the async ecosystem.

item.title: Memory Safety Without a GC: A Benchmark Story
item.description: How Rust's ownership model has steadily replaced garbage-collected runtimes.

item.title: Trait Objects vs Generics: When Does vtable Overhead Actually Matter?
item.description: Dynamic dispatch vs. monomorphised generics investigated.
